message:
fix(agent-sweep): Forward CLI flags properly to agent-sweep command

- Forward --restart flag to agent-sweep command instead of global RESTART
- Forward --timeout value as --timeout=N for agent-sweep
- Add agent-sweep to --parallel and --parallel=N flag handling

These changes ensure agent-sweep receives its own flags rather than
conflicting with global sync/review flags.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3997,19 +3997,27 @@ parse_args() {
                 shift
                 ;;
             --restart)
-                RESTART="true"
+                if [[ "$COMMAND" == "agent-sweep" ]]; then
+                    ARGS+=("$1")
+                else
+                    RESTART="true"
+                fi
                 shift
                 ;;
             --timeout)
                 if [[ $# -lt 2 ]]; then
                     log_error "--timeout requires a value in seconds"
                     exit 4
                 fi
-                GIT_TIMEOUT="$2"
+                if [[ "$COMMAND" == "agent-sweep" ]]; then
+                    ARGS+=("--timeout=$2")
+                else
+                    GIT_TIMEOUT="$2"
+                fi
                 shift 2
                 ;;
             --parallel)
-                if [[ "$COMMAND" == "review" ]]; then
+                if [[ "$COMMAND" == "review" || "$COMMAND" == "agent-sweep" ]]; then
                     if [[ $# -lt 2 ]]; then
                         log_error "--parallel requires a number"
                         exit 4
@@ -4033,7 +4041,7 @@ parse_args() {
                 fi
                 ;;
             --parallel=*)
-                if [[ "$COMMAND" == "review" ]]; then
+                if [[ "$COMMAND" == "review" || "$COMMAND" == "agent-sweep" ]]; then
                     ARGS+=("$1")
                 elif [[ -z "$COMMAND" ]]; then
                     pending_global_args+=("$1")
